code: import React,{useState}from"react";import"./StartForm.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const StartForm=_ref=>{let{onStart}=_ref;const[name,setName]=useState("");const[numQuestions,setNumQuestions]=useState(10);const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(name.trim()===""){alert("Veuillez entrer votre nom");return;}onStart(name.trim(),numQuestions);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"start-form",onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("header",{className:"app-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h1",{children:["Quiz ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{})," Devellope",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("sup",{children:"ment"})," generale ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{})," informatique"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"subtitle",children:"2026 / Maroc"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Entrez votre nom :"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Votre nom",value:name,onChange:e=>setName(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"numQuestions",children:"Nombre de questions :"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("select",{id:"numQuestions",value:numQuestions,onChange:e=>setNumQuestions(Number(e.target.value)),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:10,children:"10"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:20,children:"20"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:30,children:"30"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:40,children:"40"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Commencer"})]});};export default StartForm;
